title: Junior Frontend Developer at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates!
